query:
-- Verify invoice FAC-2026-0004
SELECT id, invoiceNumber, status, reservationId, total, itemsJson 
FROM invoices 
WHERE invoiceNumber = 'FAC-2026-0004';

-- Verify reservation 480001
SELECT id, status, channel, product_id, product_name, paid_at, booking_date, invoiceId, invoiceNumber
FROM reservations
WHERE id = 480001;
